## Root Cause Summary

On a DMR AP X1
system, we are seeing a very low PC6 Residency of ~49%, this in turn is pushing
OS Idle power ~30W over the target.

One of the reasons
for such a low residency is due to D2D L1. When D2D interface entered L1 state
as part of PC6, its residency is very low ~42%. This is limiting overall PC6
Residency. 

 

When we try to
disable D2D L1, that further reduces PC6 residency to ~27%. This is due to a
known issue where CBB D2D Qchannel FSM keeps denying the Idle request. 

 

 

Need a

### Description
On a DMR AP X1
system, we are seeing a very low PC6 Residency of ~49%, this in turn is pushing
OS Idle power ~30W over the target.

One of the reasons
for such a low residency is due to D2D L1. When D2D interface entered L1 state
as part of PC6, its residency is very low ~42%. This is limiting overall PC6
Residency. 

 

When we try to
disable D2D L1, that further reduces PC6 residency to ~27%. This is due to a
known issue where CBB D2D Qchannel FSM keeps denying the Idle request. 

 

 

Need a Pcode patch
to disable D2D L1 and see if there is anything else limiting Residency.

### Conclusion
no_root_cause.rejected
